domain: Albanian Kanun customary law (Code of Lekë Dukagjini, oral until 20th c, 12 sections + 1262 articles): pleqt elder-council tribunal + kuvend village assembly arbitration forum + besa personal-honor binding oath (promise + truce + guest-protection) + nderi family honor + precedent-case retrieval through oral case-base + collective deliberation enforces consensus binding decisions sustaining group cohesion under sparse state penetration
specific_mechanism: KANUN-BESA-PRECEDENT-TRIBUNAL: 3-elder LLM-judge tribunal with besa-oath confidence binding + precedent-case retrieval + retraction penalty + nderi family-honor identity track. (1) 3 elder judges L_1, L_2, L_3 (independent LLM instances with diverse clan-A/B/C system prompts) score each evaluation candidate. (2) Each L_i first retrieves k_p precedent cases from a Kanun-style case-base K (indexed via embedding similarity to current case) and conditions scoring on retrieved precedents. (3) Besa-oath: each L_i produces verdict v_i + confidence c_i ∈ [0,1] + a binding-promise to abide by retraction-penalty if |v_i - consensus| > δ. (4) Final consensus v* = weighted-majority(v_i; w_i = c_i^γ) where γ > 1 amplifies high-confidence votes; ties broken by precedent-coverage score |retrieved-precedents covering v_i|. (5) Retraction penalty: if |v_i - v*| > δ then c_i_calibration ← c_i × (1-η), discouraging overconfident bad judgments across cases. (6) Nderi family-honor track: per-system-prompt-family weight n_f ∈ [0.5, 1.5] tracks historical consensus-alignment for stability; weight applied as w_i ← w_i × n_f(L_i). (7) Differs from R481 KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE (harmonic-partial multi-criteria judge, no besa-retraction + no precedent-retrieval) and R494 NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL (trance-medium-council pipeline, no precedent-retrieval + no besa-binding) by precedent-index retrieval + besa-oath confidence binding + retraction penalty + nderi-family-honor identity track.
llm_application: KANUN-BESA-PRECEDENT-TRIBUNAL 3-elder LLM-judge tribunal + precedent-case-base k_p retrieval per judge + besa-oath confidence-binding c_i amplified weighted-majority w_i = c_i^γ + retraction-penalty calibration update on verdict divergence > δ + nderi family-honor system-prompt-family stable identity weight tracking. Differs from R359 ETRUSCAN haruspex (auspicy-style eval). R430 KINTSUGI repair-eval. R445 IFA divination judge. R456 JHATOR sky-burial-eval. R466 ROMANI-KRIS (closest — court-tribunal, but no besa retraction + no precedent index). R481 KHOOMEI-PARTIAL-JUDGE (closest — harmonic-partial multi-criteria, no besa + no precedent). R494 NECHUNG-3-TIER-EVAL (closest — 3-tier pipeline, no precedent + no besa). Differs from LLMs-as-Judges Survey 2412.05579 + TriBench-Ko 2605.03792 + Judge AI Appeals + LLM-as-Judge Survey ScienceDirect 2025 by precedent-index retrieval per judge + besa-confidence binding + retraction-penalty + nderi-family-honor track. Differs by BESA-OATH BINDING + PRECEDENT INDEX + RETRACTION PENALTY + NDERI FAMILY-HONOR.
novelty_claim: LLMs-as-Judges Survey + TriBench-Ko + Judge AI Appeals + LLM-as-Judge Survey cover LLM-judge + ensemble + precedent-retrieval + calibration space. KANUN-BESA-PRECEDENT-TRIBUNAL adds (a) explicit precedent case-base retrieval per judge before scoring + (b) besa-oath confidence-binding c_i amplified weighted-majority + (c) retraction-penalty calibration update on verdict-divergence + (d) nderi family-honor system-prompt-family stable identity tracking. Recombination — borderline lookup.
